title: Supporting Participants: Payments, Benefits, and Indirect Costs — eTraining Module
content: Self-paced Articulate Rise module on participant support costs in sponsored projects. Covers participant stipends, student tuition and healthcare coverage, participant travel, and the budget concepts that frame these costs: indirect costs, Modified Total Direct Costs (MTDC), and why participant support is excluded from MTDC. Designed to help research staff process participant payments compliantly and avoid common errors.
